They are arranged in a fixed order, and we need to determine the correct positions based on the given clues. First, let me list out the clues again to make sure I don't miss any: 1. The hawk is to the right of the owl. 2. The hummingbird is to the right of the hawk. 3. The crow is the second from the right. 4. The robin is the second from the left. We need to arrange the five birds from left to right, considering these clues. Let me recall that "to the right of" means that if bird A is to the right of bird B, then bird A is positioned after bird B when looking from left to right. Let me start by considering the positions.
